signatureMove.name: Extraction
signatureMove.extraText: Damage from this attack cannot be reduced by enemy passive abilities.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of melee, this character gains +1 Melee Stat until end of game.

abilities.name: Weakling
abilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

abilities.name: The Big They Are...
abilities.description: During a round of melee with an enemy that has Evade Stat of +1 or higher, this character ignores Weakling, deals +X Melee Dmg and reduces all Melee Dmg suffered by -X, where X is the Evade Stat of the enemy.

abilities.name: Faerie Mischief
abilities.description: Whenever a friendly Faerie within 6" bluffs successfully, you may reveal the card and this character gains 2 energy and restores all Wds.

abilities.name: Sedatives
abilities.description: Whilst this model is in play, the first time each enemy gains Weakling in a turn, they lose 1 energy.

abilities.name: Sleepy Time
abilities.description: This attack is not inhibited by Evade Stat.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target gains Weakling until end of turn.
Target with Weakling or Feeble loses all energy and gains +X Evade Stat until end of turn.
